summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CMS-driven marketing website for MyRent/SyncBeds. All major sections and content are displaying correctly matching the reference design. Home page loads with all required sections populated with proper content and styling.

ui_bugs.issue: CMS login functionality not accessible through standard UI flows
ui_bugs.description: Login button in navigation and CMS login link in footer do not open login forms or redirect to login pages

ui_bugs.issue: Language selector dropdown not opening with standard click interactions
ui_bugs.description: UK flag button in navigation appears to be present but dropdown functionality not working as expected

passed_tests: Home page loads correctly with all sections
Hero section shows 'All in one' highlighted in teal color
Hero has 'Get started' and 'See more' buttons (both clickable)
PMS section with dark background displays correctly
Features list shows 5 feature cards (Smart Calendar, Real-time Sync, Automated Messaging, Analytics & Reports, Guest Verification)
Booking providers section shows 6 partner logos (Airbnb, Booking.com, Expedia, Vrbo, TripAdvisor, Google)
CTA section with primary (teal) background displays correctly
Testimonials section renders with proper styling
FAQ section renders with proper styling
Footer displays with all links and newsletter signup form
All content sections have proper multilingual structure
Hero_2 type layout (centered text, image below) working correctly
Teal color highlighting throughout the site
Typography and spacing consistent with design
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix CMS login functionality - ensure login button opens login form or redirects to login page. Verify language selector dropdown functionality works correctly.
